title: Product Data Analyst
responsibilities: prepare datasets and business reports; build dashboards for product and operations teams; translate analytical findings into action items
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in sql, python, excel, tableau, bigquery. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: TalentGrid is hiring a junior product data analyst to support analyzing business metrics, building dashboards, and explaining trends.
raw_text: Vacancy V032: Product Data Analyst at TalentGrid. Location: Odesa. Employment: hybrid. Required experience: 1.5 years. Required skills: sql, python, excel, tableau, bigquery, a/b testing, power bi, pandas. Optional skills: dbt, forecasting, product analytics. Responsibilities: prepare datasets and business reports; build dashboards for product and operations teams; translate analytical findings into action items.
